## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful for ZmanBar users?

## Proposed behavior

Describe how you expect the feature to work.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Compatibility considerations

Does this affect GNOME Shell compatibility, settings, packaging, translations, or existing behavior?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, references, or examples if helpful.
